_meta.description: JSON patch for Batch 1 grammar fix completion — 2026-03-30
_meta.instructions: Apply these changes to modernization-ledger.json and initialization.json

M300.description: Grammar audit verified 2026-03-30: of 138 COBOL-85 gaps identified, ~102 are fixed. 36 verified remaining → 29 after Batch 1 (7 REJECT gaps closed). Remaining: Data Division 15 open, Procedure Division 3 open, Environment Division 11 open. Batch 1 complete: USE GLOBAL/EXCEPTION/ERROR/modes, STOP RUN STATUS, START WITH LENGTH, ALPHABET FOR, CLASS FOR. Batch 2 next: SET ON/OFF, SORT Format 2, SYMBOLIC CHARACTERS N:N.

M401.evidence: Grammar: startWithLength rule added to CobolIO.g4. Lexer: LENGTH token added. Parser tests pass. Integration test: Start_WithLength_ParsesSuccessfully. Regression: 922 unit + 302 integration + 95 NIST = 0 failures.

M403.evidence: Grammar: GLOBAL? added to useStatement in CobolControlFlow.g4. Binder: BoundUseStatement.IsGlobal property added. Integration test: Use_Global_AfterStandardException_ParsesSuccessfully. Regression: 0 failures.

M404.evidence: Grammar: (EXCEPTION | ERROR) alternation added to useStatement. Integration test: Use_ErrorSynonym_ParsesSuccessfully. Regression: 0 failures.

M405.evidence: Grammar: useOnTarget rule added with INPUT/OUTPUT/I_O/EXTEND alternatives. Binder: BoundUseStatement.TargetMode property added. Integration tests: Use_InputMode, Use_OutputMode, Use_IoMode, Use_ExtendMode (4 tests). Regression: 0 failures.

M406.evidence: Grammar: stopStatusPhrase rule added to CobolControlFlow.g4. Lexer: NORMAL token added. Integration tests: StopRun_WithNormalStatus, StopRun_WithErrorStatus, StopRun_Plain (3 tests). Regression: 0 failures.

M409.evidence: Grammar: FOR (ALPHANUMERIC | NATIONAL) phrase added to alphabetClause in CobolSpecialNames.g4. Lexer: NATIONAL token added. Integration tests: Alphabet_ForAlphanumeric, Alphabet_ForNational. Regression: 0 failures.

M410.evidence: Grammar: FOR (ALPHANUMERIC | NATIONAL) phrase added to classDefinitionClause in CobolSpecialNames.g4. Integration test: Class_ForAlphanumeric_ParsesSuccessfully. Regression: 0 failures.
